case_title: NIMER MASSIS RESPONDENT VS. JEFF ROSEN et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2003 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2003 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL ON MAY-07-2003 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 504.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-07-2003 IN DEPT. 504 - ORDERED ASSIGNED TO 504 FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF NIMER MASSIS AND AGAINST AVENUE 9 FOR $2,509.26, $81.00 COSTS AND $100.00 ATTORNEYS FEES. NIMER MASSIS TO TAKE NOTHING AS TO INDIVIDUAL JEFF ROSEN. EXHIBITS RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED (504)
TRIAL BRIEF - PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT'S BRIEF ON SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL - TRIAL DE NOVO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MASSIS, NIMER RECOVER FROM APPELLANT AVENUE 9 $2,509.26 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $81.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,690.26, AND RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF NIMER MASSIS TO TAKE NOTHING AS TO APPELLANT/DEFENDANT JEFF ROSEN. SEE SCANNED DOC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MASSIS, NIMER RECOVER FROM APPELLANT AVENUE 9 $250,926.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $81.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $251,107.00, - AMENDED JUDGMENT TO REFLECT APPELLANT/DEFENDANT AS NIKAMAX RESTAURANTS, INC., DBA AVENUE 9. SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL TO AVENUE 9 RETURNED ADDRESSED- UNABLE TO FORWARD.
